features.title: Psychological Stability Index (PSI)
features.description: A 0–100 score updated in real time, mapped to Stable (≥88), Caution (55–87), and Critical (<55) so you can see when emotional pressure is building.

features.title: Seven behavioral dimensions
features.description: Separate signals for revenge-style re-entry, stop manipulation, size outliers, hold-time collapse, holding deep losses, rule violations, and overtrading — each with its own weight you can tune.

features.title: Floating HUD + hub
features.description: A lightweight overlay during trading plus a full hub for session stats, timelines, history, profile baselines, and settings — all inside NinjaTrader 8.

features.title: Adaptive local baselines
features.description: Uses online statistics to adapt to your own trade timing and rhythm. Playback sessions do not pollute your live baseline.

features.title: No cloud, no accounts
features.description: Your trading data stays on your machine. No telemetry, no analytics, no behavioral data in the cloud — suitable for traders who care about privacy.

features.title: Built for NinjaTrader 8
features.description: Ships as an NT8 add-on using account and execution events. Works in live and Market Replay. NinjaTrader 7 is not supported.

features.title: Alerts you can hear and see
features.description: Visual and optional voice alerts when PSI or dimensions cross the thresholds you configure — a nudge to pause, not an order blocker.
